news.text: Beginning a Ph.D. in Computer Science at Colorado School of Mines with a focus on HCI.
Completing the M.S. in Computer Science at Marshall University with thesis work on VR industrial maintenance training.
State-aware adaptive feedback work accepted at the IEEE Global Humanitarian Technology Conference (GHTC).
Awarded the Creative Discovery and Research Award at Marshall University for cross-disciplinary research.
Presented two VR workforce training papers at IEEE ROSE.

research.title: Human-Centered AI for Training
research.text: Designing adaptive simulation environments that improve training, safety, and decision-making in complex systems.

research.title: VR Industrial Maintenance
research.text: Studying state-aware feedback, procedural task tracking, hesitation events, safety violations, and telemetry in a VR hydroelectric maintenance environment.

research.title: Reinforcement Learning & Feedback
research.text: Exploring reinforcement-learning-inspired feedback loops and state hierarchies for procedural skill acquisition.

research.title: Immersive Analytics & XR
research.text: Building interfaces that combine immersive environments with interpretable performance data, visual evidence, and decision-support cues.

research.title: Embedded & Secure Systems
research.text: Prior work includes FPGA-based entropy generation, NIST validation, and reproducible embedded-security reporting.

research.title: Community Resilience Modeling
research.text: Modeling prolonged disruption, social connectivity, migration, and policy-driven allocation under public-health stressors.

projects.title: VR Hydroelectric Maintenance Trainer
projects.text: A VR system for safety-critical industrial maintenance training using task-state tracking, adaptive HUD feedback, and performance telemetry.

projects.title: State-Aware Analysis Pipeline
projects.text: A source-of-truth analysis workflow for participant-level KPIs, event logs, survey scoring, Welch tests, effect sizes, and thesis figures.

projects.title: Community Resilience ABM
projects.text: An agent-based framework integrating social connectivity, migration, and policy allocation for modeling prolonged disruption.

projects.title: FPGA-Based True Random Number Generator
projects.text: An FPGA entropy-generation project evaluated with NIST randomness testing for cryptographic applications.

projects.title: GameShelf Web Platform
projects.text: A cloud-based game catalog platform supporting user reviews, social connectivity, and database-backed web functionality.

projects.title: Facial Recognition Attendance System
projects.text: A real-time recognition and logging system designed for multi-camera attendance workflows.

publications.title: State-Aware Adaptive Feedback and Performance Telemetry in Virtual Reality Industrial Maintenance Training
State-Aware Adaptive Feedback in Virtual Reality for Safety-Critical Infrastructure Training
A Scenario-Driven Virtual Reality Hydroelectric Training Environment with Fine-Grained Telemetry for Performance Evaluation
Assessing Procedural Content Generation in Reinforcement Learning Prompt-Based Feedback via Adaptive Virtual Reality Industrial Environments for Workforce Training
Modeling Community Resilience Under Prolonged Disruption: An Agent-Based Framework Integrating Social Connectivity, Migration, and Policy-Driven Allocation
publications.note: Awarded Creative Discovery and Research Award.

publications.title: An Analysis of Entropy and Randomness as it Relates to True Random Number Generation
publications.venue: NSA Future Computer Summer Internship Cohort, 2024

publications.title: Optimizing Machine Learning Models Using TVM
publications.venue: REU Research Symposium, University of Louisville, 2023

teaching.text: Supporting instruction and student guidance as part of Ph.D. funding.
Guided 40+ students in algorithmic design, grading, and course support.
Organizing student technical activities, workshops, and peer support.
